examples.en: I need to iron my shirt before work.
examples.zh: 我上班前得燙一下襯衫。

examples.en: This shirt is too tight on me.
These pants are really comfortable.
He spilled coffee on his pants.
examples.zh: 他把咖啡灑到褲子上了。

examples.en: She wore a red dress to the party.
examples.zh: 她穿了一件紅色洋裝去派對。

examples.en: That dress looks great on you.
Take off your shoes before you come in.
My shoes got wet in the rain.
Wear a hat, it's sunny outside.
I left my hat on the bus.
examples.zh: 我把帽子忘在公車上了。

examples.en: Bring a jacket, it gets cold at night.
He hung his jacket on the chair.
I can't find a matching pair of socks.
examples.zh: 我找不到一雙成對的襪子。

examples.en: These socks have a hole in them.
She bought a new skirt for spring.
examples.zh: 她買了一件春天穿的新裙子。

examples.en: This skirt is a little too short.
Put on your coat, it's freezing.
examples.zh: 穿上你的大衣,外面冷死了。

examples.en: Her coat is made of wool.
I can't read without my glasses.
He just got a new pair of glasses.
Her brother is really tall.
You have to be tall to play basketball well.
I'm too short to reach the top shelf.
examples.zh: 我太矮了,搆不到最上層的架子。

examples.en: She has short hair now.
Your hair looks nice today.
examples.zh: 你今天的頭髮看起來很好看。

examples.en: I need to wash my hair.
She looks younger than her age.
examples.zh: 她看起來比實際年齡年輕。

examples.en: He started working at a young age.
examples.zh: 他很年輕就開始工作了。

examples.en: That baby is so cute!
She wore a cute little dress.
examples.zh: 她穿了一件可愛的小洋裝。

examples.en: He wears a T-shirt and jeans every day.
I got this T-shirt at a concert.
examples.zh: 這件T恤是我在演唱會買的。

examples.en: These jeans fit me perfectly.
examples.zh: 這條牛仔褲我穿剛剛好。

examples.en: She ripped her jeans at the knee.
examples.zh: 她的牛仔褲膝蓋磨破了。

examples.en: This sweater keeps me warm.
My grandma knitted me a sweater.
examples.zh: 我奶奶織了一件毛衣給我。

examples.en: She wrapped a scarf around her neck.
This scarf goes well with your coat.
examples.zh: 這條圍巾跟你的大衣很搭。

examples.en: Wear gloves so your hands don't freeze.
I lost one of my gloves.
These boots are great for hiking.
She wears boots in the winter.
He collects limited-edition sneakers.
My sneakers are worn out.
He tightened his belt one notch.
This belt matches your shoes.
examples.zh: 這條皮帶跟你的鞋子很配。

examples.en: She wore a gold necklace to dinner.
examples.zh: 她戴著金項鍊去吃晚餐。

examples.en: This necklace was a gift from my mom.
She wears a ring on her left hand.
He bought her a diamond ring.
He's tall and handsome.
You look so handsome in that suit.
examples.zh: 你穿那套西裝看起來好帥。

examples.en: She has a beautiful smile.
What a beautiful dress!
He's gotten thin since he started running.
examples.zh: 他開始跑步後瘦了下來。

examples.en: She's naturally thin.
She has beautiful curly hair.
My hair gets curly when it rains.
examples.zh: 下雨時我的頭髮會變捲。

examples.en: She has long, straight hair.
examples.zh: 她有一頭又長又直的頭髮。

examples.en: I want to get my hair straight.
His father is going bald.
The bald man wore a shiny hat.
examples.zh: 那個禿頭男人戴了頂亮亮的帽子。

examples.en: He wore a black suit to the interview.
This suit needs to be dry-cleaned.
He can't tie his own tie.
That tie doesn't match your shirt.
examples.zh: 那條領帶跟你的襯衫不搭。

examples.en: I left my wallet at home.
He keeps photos in his wallet.
She works out to stay in shape.
He's in great shape for his age.
examples.zh: 以他的年紀來說他身材很好。

examples.en: He's a good-looking guy.
They make a good-looking couple.
She tied her hair into a ponytail.
A ponytail keeps hair out of your face.
examples.zh: 馬尾能讓頭髮不擋到臉。

examples.en: She just got bangs cut.
My bangs are getting too long.
I love your outfit today!
examples.zh: 我很喜歡你今天的穿搭!

examples.en: She picked out an outfit for the wedding.
examples.zh: 她挑了一套婚禮要穿的服裝。

examples.en: The dress code is casual.
He prefers casual clothes over suits.
examples.zh: 比起西裝他更喜歡休閒服。

examples.en: She's always so fashionable.
That jacket is really fashionable.
This fabric doesn't wrinkle easily.
He has a few wrinkles around his eyes.
The baby has chubby cheeks.
examples.zh: 這個寶寶臉頰胖嘟嘟的。

examples.en: He was a chubby kid.
examples.zh: 他小時候是個胖嘟嘟的孩子。

examples.en: She stays slim by eating healthy.
examples.zh: 她靠健康飲食保持苗條。

examples.en: These jeans have a slim fit.
examples.zh: 這款牛仔褲是修身版型。

examples.en: He has a muscular build.
Years of training made him muscular.
examples.zh: 多年的訓練讓他變得很壯。

examples.en: We're dressing up for the party tonight.
examples.zh: 我們今晚要盛裝去派對。

examples.en: You don't need to dress up, it's casual.
examples.zh: 你不用特別打扮,是休閒場合。

examples.en: Can I try on these shoes?
She tried on five dresses before choosing one.
examples.zh: 她試穿了五件洋裝才選一件。

examples.en: She doesn't wear much makeup.
It takes her an hour to do her makeup.
She looked elegant in her long gown.
examples.zh: 她穿著長禮服顯得很優雅。

examples.en: The room had an elegant style.
examples.zh: 這房間有種優雅的風格。
